---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? Describe the use
case, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches the request path, routing, or stored
config, say how.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, or how you work around this now.

## Scope check

This project aims to stay a **lean** OpenAI-compatible proxy. Briefly: why does
this belong in the core rather than in a fork or a separate tool?
